plugins.prepareCmd: sed -i 's/version = ".*"/version = "${nextRelease.version}"/' pyproject.toml && sed -i 's/__version__ = ".*"/__version__ = "${nextRelease.version}"/' agent_eval/__init__.py && sed -i 's/"version": ".*"/"version": "${nextRelease.version}"/' .claude-plugin/plugin.json && sed -i 's/"version": ".*"/"version": "${nextRelease.version}"/' .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
